name: Fork Lifter Simulator | Construction Games - Parking Games

reviews.review_description: Don’t understand to hard not enough time!
Cab I have a refund please

Wish you could reverse as a real forklift can reverse. Many at a times wanted to just rervese to position myself better but cant as youve not got it. 
The collision isn't perfect making sometimes hitting a pallet wrong which makes you think how the hell did I hit that when the forks ain't even touching. 
May suggest making you use the actual controls knobs to the side a thing to bring more realistic sim feel. Felt like it was immersive enough.
Graphics fine just issues that should be been reviewed better and fixed
